VAL-API-013.resolution: Accepted as correct behavior - FastAPI/Pydantic returns 422 (Unprocessable Entity) for JSON validation/parse errors by convention. This is semantically correct and provides detailed error information.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated VAL-API-013 status from 'failed' to 'passed' with explanation that FastAPI/Pydantic's 422 is the correct standard behavior for JSON parsing errors
